title: schefflera apiculata
intro: Schefflera apiculata, also known as the umbrella tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae and is native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schefflera apiculata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and using them in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
